description: §52.8 SSR first-paint render (D1/D2, S234-235) — a server-authority <each> whose rows are pre-rendered INTO the first-paint HTML (keyed data-scrml-key) so view-source contains the rows before client JS. RUNTIME HALF CLOSED (S236 E-ADAPTER): the server-eval SSR path invokes the REAL _scrml_ssr_compose_handler, asserts the composed first-paint carries the keyed rows + the window.__scrml_ssr_state seed, then hydrates the client (accounts = the seeded rows). Previously runtime-half-pending — the adapter had no SSR-compose path; it now does.
rationale: §52.8: server-authoritative reactive variables SHALL be included in the SSR output; the D1 server-side row renderer (codegen/emit-ssr-render.ts) emits per-row HTML keyed data-scrml-key into the each-mount. The runtime proof: _scrml_ssr_compose_handler fills the mount with the rows + seeds window.__scrml_ssr_state, and the client hydrates in place (D2 shape, now driven through the whole compile pipeline).
